summary: Completed comprehensive testing of interest calculation refactor in Jewellery Lending System. Backend API functionality is fully working with 100% test success rate. All interest calculation scenarios validated successfully. Frontend has minor navigation UX issues but core display functionality appears operational.

design_issues.issue: Inconsistent navigation to account detail pages - sometimes redirects to New Account form instead of existing account details
Authentication session appears to expire during testing, causing logout

passed_tests: Interest Calc Scenario 1: Partial interest payment (15000 @ 2.5% + 5000 @ 3%, payment 1020, expected pending interest 400)
Interest Calc Scenario 2: Payment greater than interest (interest paid first, then principal)
Multiple Landed Entries: Different rates maintained correctly
Interest Carry Forward: Remaining interest after partial payment carries forward
Interest Calculation Summary Display (₹1,820.00 pending interest shown)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UX improvements needed: 1) Fix account navigation to ensure clicking account links goes to detail page instead of new account form. 2) Improve session management to prevent unexpected logouts. Core interest calculation functionality is fully working.
